nul-wl-new-02: A raw, grainy 35mm film ACTION photograph. Charging waist-deep into crashing ocean surf at golden hour, a woman kicks up a sheet of backlit spray with her shins as a wave breaks across her thighs. Subject: late-20s white woman, slim toned build. This is an ACTION photograph: the subject is actively DOING something physical, caught candidly in the very middle of the act, body in motion — never posed, never static, never calm. Frozen sharp at a fast shutter, catching the person in the very middle of the physical action — caught in the act, body clearly mid-motion but crisp. Dynamic and candid.

It must NOT look polished, cinematic, or AI. Use the reference ONLY as a film-look + motion-blur anchor — match its grade and blur character — but IGNORE its scene, people and composition.
